Student Name: Alex Rivera
Email: alex.rivera@gmail.com
Intended Major: engineering
Ethnicity: latinx
GPA: 3.90
Activity: Community Service Volunteer
Award: City STEM Leadership Award

My leadership journey began through service projects that blended technology and community needs. I led a student team to run weekend workshops introducing younger students to robotics and design thinking. We taught them to define problems clearly, test solutions quickly, and work collaboratively across different skill levels. The experience strengthened my communication and project-management skills while showing me that innovation is most meaningful when it is shared. In college, I want to deepen my engineering background and continue mentoring students from underrepresented communities in STEM.
